Homepage.kudosDesc: Sun* Kudos is part of the Sun* Annual Awards, a place where every Sunner can send thanks and recognition to teammates through Kudos cards — a simple yet meaningful way.
Homepage.b4Block1p1: Sun* Annual Awards 2025 (SAA) is built on the spirit of Root Further — Growing Deep, Reaching Far. With SAA 2025, we don't measure success only by outstanding achievements, but also cherish sustainable values nurtured from the roots.
Homepage.b4Block1p2: At Sun*, every individual is an important root. When nurtured properly — through growth, connection, and core values — those roots will reach further than expected.
Homepage.b4Quote: A tree with deep roots fears no storm
Homepage.b4Block2: SAA 2025 is an occasion for Sun* to look back on the journey, honor those who have quietly built value for the organization, for teammates, and for themselves. This is not just an awards ceremony — it is an affirmation that what is sustainable, what is truly valuable, always starts from the roots.

KudosActionBar.sendPrompt: Today, who would you like to send thanks and recognition to?

KudosFeed.empty: No appreciation yet — be the first to recognize!

WriteKudo.modalTitle: Send appreciation and recognition to your teammate
WriteKudo.titlePlaceholder: Give a title to your teammate
WriteKudo.titleHint:
Example: The person who motivates me.
The title will be displayed as your Kudos heading.
WriteKudo.editorPlaceholder: Share your appreciation and recognition for your teammate here!
WriteKudo.mentionHint: You can use "@ + name" to mention another colleague

AddLink.title: Add link
AddLink.contentMaxLength: Content must be 100 characters or less
AddLink.urlMaxLength: URL must be 2048 characters or less
AddLink.urlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://

RulesPanelContent.heroTitle: KUDOS RECIPIENT: HERO BADGE FOR POSITIVE INFLUENCE
RulesPanelContent.heroDesc: Based on the number of teammates who send you Kudos, you will receive a corresponding Hero Badge — a symbol of the positive influence you have created in the Sun* community.
RulesPanelContent.senderTitle: KUDOS SENDER: COLLECT ALL 6 ICONS, GET A MYSTERY GIFT
RulesPanelContent.senderDesc: Every time you send Kudos, you have a chance to receive 1 of 6 icons — each icon represents a core value of Sun*. Collect all 6 different icons to unlock a special gift!
RulesPanelContent.senderGift: When you collect the full set → You will receive 1 Secret Box — a special mystery gift from Sun*!
RulesPanelContent.nationalDesc: Top Kudos with the most likes (👍) will be honored at SAA 2025.
RulesPanelContent.tier1Desc: The journey of spreading good deeds begins...
RulesPanelContent.tier4Count: More than 20 people sent you Kudos
